name: How much does Google Assistant optimization cost?
description: Pricing varies by scope. A basic cleanup is cheaper, while ongoing optimization with content, schema, local SEO, and technical fixes costs more.

mainEntity.name: How much does Google Assistant optimization cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cost depends on whether you need a one-time cleanup, ongoing SEO support, or technical development work. The biggest cost drivers are content rewrites, schema implementation, local listing management, and site speed fixes.
acceptedAnswer.description: Pricing varies by scope. A basic cleanup is cheaper, while ongoing optimization with content, schema, local SEO, and technical fixes costs more.
